name: io.github.tolboy/telegram-mcp-tdlib
title: Telegram MCP Server
description: Local-first TDLib Telegram MCP server with 110 tools, account isolation and production guardrails.

environmentVariables.name: TDLIB_PHONE_NUMBER
environmentVariables.description: Telegram phone number; omit after preparing a persisted session when using QR authentication

environmentVariables.name: TDLIB_AUTH_CODE
environmentVariables.description: One-time Telegram login code for a fresh headless container

environmentVariables.name: TDLIB_2FA_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Telegram 2FA password when the account requires it

environmentVariables.name: MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Keep true for safe first use

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TOOL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool surface: reader, inbox, community-admin, research, or all
